## Source: ossf-package-analysis (9d32eaf9f87e33988e5e3677089359245c729d8a5ed621afbeac27d9f0644895)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@adac-fahrzeugplattform/ui' @ 99.9.9 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
